assertions.text: Arc has a discernible logic where the editor can understand why each edition follows the previous one
Each edition plan is specific enough to brief a writer from, not vague topic labels
At least one entry-point edition is identified for new subscribers and promotion
Editorial promise is one sentence that could be tested against any edition
Target reader description includes at least one frustration or unmet need
What-we-don't-do section is genuinely restrictive, excluding things that might seem relevant
Output identifies recurring themes with sentiment tags and frequency notes
At least one representative direct quote is included per theme
Output ends with 3-5 specific, concrete recommended actions
Output defines 3-5 distinct audience segments with clear labels
Each segment has specific content strategy recommendations
Output includes practical implementation steps for actually segmenting the list
